name: Andrea's Baked Ziti
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 15 oz ricotta cheese, 1 egg, 1/4 cup parsley, and 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese together.
2. Gently mix the cooked hamburger with the ricotta mixture.
3. Add the cooked Ziti to the mixture.
4. Incorporate three-quarters of the sauce of your choice into the dish.
5. Spread the mixture in a baking pan.
6. Pour the remaining sauce over the top.
7. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese evenly on top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes.
Source: Andrea Cassoni, Cyberealm BBS originally posted 9/28/92
